positive: Minimalist celestial watercolor print featuring a stylized crescent moon cradling a glowing, abstract constellation of geometric stars. The design should be centered and symmetrically balanced, suitable for apparel. Color palette: Deep indigo blues, dusty lavender, hints of brilliant gold, and creamy white accents. Style: Detailed line art mixed with soft watercolor washes, evoking cosmic mystery and calm. Composition should feature strong negative space around the central subject, ensuring maximum print visibility. Lighting: Soft, ethereal glow emanating from the stars, giving a dreamlike, luminous quality. Highly intricate details, high contrast silhouette against a slightly textured background.
